zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Cotton於1389年出生在英國坎布利其爾藍德瓦德時，他的父親John Cotton24歲，母親Bridgett Grace24歲。他於1400年與Johanna Reade在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾藍德瓦德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1445年5月14日在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾藍德瓦德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Cotton于1389年出生在英国坎布利其爾藍德瓦德时，他的父亲John Cotton24岁，母亲Bridgett Grace24岁。他于1400年与Johanna Reade在英国英格兰坎布利其爾藍德瓦德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1445年5月14日在他的家乡享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾藍德瓦德。

nameMeanings.name: Cotton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called from Old English (æt) cotum (dative plural of cot) ‘at the cottages or huts’ (or sometimes possibly from a Middle English plural, coten). Examples include Coton (Cambridgeshire, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire), Cottam (East Yorkshire, Lancashire, Nottinghamshire), and Cotham (Nottinghamshire). Particularly common in Staffordshire.
French: from a pet form of the personal name Nicolas (see Nicholas ), derived via Nicot, or of the personal name Jacques , derived via Jacot.
History: John Cotton (1584–1652) was a noted Puritan preacher, who landed at Boston, MA, from London in 1633 and became leader of the Congregationalists in America.

variants.name: Cotten
meanings: Altered form of German Kotten, a habitational name from any of several places so named in Rhineland, Westphalia, Silesia, etc., or perhaps an American shortened form of composite German surnames such as Kottenhagen, Kottenhoff, Kottenkamp (see Koth ).

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: English (southwestern England and south Wales) and Dutch: from the personal name Nicholas (from Latin Nicolaus, from Greek Nikolaos, from nikān ‘to conquer’ + laos ‘people’). Forms with -ch- are due to hypercorrection (compare Anthony ). The name in various vernacular forms was popular among Christians throughout Europe in the Middle Ages, largely as a result of the fame of a 4th-century Lycian bishop, about whom a large number of legends grew up, and who was venerated in the Orthodox Church as well as the Catholic. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ), Greek Papanikolaou ‘(son of) Nicholas the priest’ and Nikolopoulos . Compare Nickolas .

History: The colonial official and revolutionary patriot Robert Carter Nicholas was from a prominent VA family on both sides. His father was a British navy surgeon who emigrated c. 1700 from Lancashire, England, to Williamsburg, VA.

variants.name: Cotham
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Cotton  .

variants.name: Cottam
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): variant of   Cotton  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Cotton was born in 1389, in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, John Cotton, was 24 and his mother, Bridgett Grace, was 24. He married Johanna Reade in 1400, in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 14 May 1445, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Cotton est né en 1389, à Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, John Cotton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Bridgett Grace, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Reade en 1400, à Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 mai 1445, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Cotton 1389 in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Cotton 24 und seine Mutter Bridgett Grace 24. Er hat 1400 in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Johanna Reade geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. Mai 1445 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Cotton è nato il nel 1389 nel Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, John Cotton, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Bridgett Grace, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Reade nel 1400, nel Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 14 maggio 1445, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Cotton(이)가 1389년 영국 캄브리지실르 랜드웨이드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Cotton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Bridgett Grace(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 랜드웨이드에서 Johanna Reade(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1445년 5월 14일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 랜드웨이드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Cotton nasceu em 1389, em Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Cotton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Bridgett Grace, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Reade em 1400, em Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de maio de 1445, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Cotton родился в 1389 г. в местности ландвад, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Cotton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Bridgett Grace, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Reade в 1400 г. в местности ландвад, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 14 мая 1445 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности ландвад, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Cotton nació en 1389, en Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Cotton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Bridgett Grace, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Johanna Reade en 1400, en Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1445, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
